summary: Choi Yoon celebrates reaching the bronze rank on stream thanks to the training provided by Alley Boss, who also reveals he helped fund Choi's daughter's surgery. Meanwhile, professional players exploited by Director Yoon Hyun-goo express their frustration over being forced to work menial jobs as drivers. They decide that the only way to escape their abusive contracts and avoid demotion is to expose the director's unfair practices to the public by seeking help from Alley Boss.
key_moments: Choi Yoon achieves bronze rank and thanks Alley Boss for his guidance and financial help with his daughter's surgery.
Alley Boss concludes his stream after viewers demand an explanation for the surgery comments.
Pro players Jin Hwan and Youngjin conspire to expose Director Yoon Hyun-goo's abusive management and unfair labor practices to Alley Boss.
